Your Insights

Module 1 · CPI

🧠 Discover Your Interests

Find out which of 10 career worlds — from Science and Technology to Arts, Law, Business and Sports — naturally excites you most.

20Questions
10Career domains
~8 min
Module 2 · NSEAAS

💬 How Are You at School?

A friendly check-in across three areas — how you feel emotionally, how you connect socially, and how engaged you are academically.

60Statements
6 roundsof 10 each
~12 min
Module 3 · NMAP

🌟 What Kind of Person Are You?

Discover your personality across 9 dimensions — from leadership and creativity to resilience and ethical awareness. Always / Sometimes / Never.

63Statements
9Dimensions
~10 min
Module 4 · DAAB

🔬 How Sharp Are Your Abilities?

5 timed aptitude sub-tests covering Verbal, Perceptual, Numerical, Legal Studies and Health & Medical ability. Auto-advances when time is up.

190Questions
8Sub-tests
~29 min
